item.title: Mayor Mamdani kicked off NYC’s outdoor pool season today by jumping into the Thomas Jefferson Pool in East Harlem!This year marks the 90th anniversary of New York City’s iconic WPA-era outdoor pools. Summer is officially here!

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 886
item.description:

19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Adam Perry
"The limits of tyrants are prescribed by the endurance of those whom they oppress." - Frederick Douglass So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Taking no AfD prisoner
item.description: Kathrin Gebel’s apology was a classic deadpan political joke: “I have to apologize because I recently said nonsense in the Bundestag. The clitoris doesn’t have 3,000 nerve endings. It has 10,000.” She then says that confusing the number is understandable because women’s bodies and women’s health have long been neglected in research. She also adds that she wasn’t trying to compare Martin Reichardt to a vulva, because the vulva is strong and resilient—and her point was that he isn’t.
item.dc:creator: l0calh0st

item.title: Small Sunday Dump for you <3 Check your wifi :)
item.description:
One of the craziest videos I've ever seen. Good job lady, I could never stay that calm.
Just a best boy living his best life <3
That deescalated quickly
I have 2 degrees, only to realize that this is what I actually wanna do :c
This has me cracking up again and again
When groundcat meets aircat
This is not a drill
Roommate goals (for real tho, if they are THAT funny, I move in!)
The end is what makes it xD
This is what I come online for
:s
Hes so chonks I love him <3 Anyway, have a lovely Sunday :)

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: 100 yrs old!
item.description: Ya all, the impeccable, hilarious Mel Brooks is 100 today! I’m trying to think of the first movie I ever saw of his was… I think maybe History of the World, Part 1 but it also coulda been Blazing Saddles… Regardless, he’s brilliant.
item.dc:creator: actinginacave

item.title: The new marketing assistant is killing it
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: More VoidBois and yet another wild update
item.description:
Wrestling for the sun gods favor! Lol
Since they're 3mo old now we put em to work. In hospitality. Here they are learning how to make the bed. 5/7 perfect, no notes
Bob bleppin and Bear with his paw on him, he loves to do that. "Dis my bruvver"
So I was SUPER lazy last night and grabbed on old Marine Corps fleece I got thrifting instead of a blanket. I put it over my legs, cross-legged and pulled it taught so they boys could sit in it
Bob loved it, sat and watched me play games
Then today realized he could get INSIDE it and still be on my lap. It was a little awkward for both of us though
So he crawled out for armrest again
Thrifting is great! Especially if they decided to claim or ruin anything! (The socks are not thrifted, IYKYK)
BEAR POSED FOR A PICTURE!!!!! I can't wait to get another one next month! Lol, he is SO active
Napping nose to nose
Learning about the breakfast/dinner spot
Okay, another wild update: remember I got scammed Thursday(?) well I also got a poisonous spider bite. NOT a black widow or brown recluse, we're not sure what it was. We also have rattlesnakes out here occasionally and considering I was working on a rock pile when I got but I'm honestly very lucky it wasn't a fuckin rattler. TINY bite site but my leg swelled a bit and went numb. Got a Benadryl shot(?) and slept 20 hours. Still kinda numb today, and the bite site hurts/itches. I'll be fine. KfD called me again last night to check on me and we agreed: "when it rains it POURS." But I got my boys, Im just resting this weekend, and my brother is about to stop by with some food to chill for a while. So I'll be okay. But like...fuck me right? Sorry for so many (?) the last 3 days have been so much shitty chaos I have no idea what happened, when, to who anymore.
item.dc:creator: LosGatosDeLosGatos

item.title: GovBrief Today #513
item.description: A reporter walked into North Carolina's booth at the America 250 fair and found the Confederate battle flag grafted onto the state flag. North Carolina has never carried that emblem on its flag, not even when it seceded. Somebody built this version on purpose, celebrating a Confederate North Carolina. There is no gentle reading of that emblem. It was the banner of an armed rebellion fought to keep human beings enslaved and of an army that killed more than 100,000 United States soldiers. It stayed on the screens until a reporter filmed it, which means the people throwing America its 250th birthday weren't watching closely enough to notice the flag of the country's enemies that tore it apart at gunpoint. I've emailed 7,997 stories over 513 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260626-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june27 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/teen-program [3] https://go.govbrief.today/confederate-flag [4] https://go.govbrief.today/intel-leaked [5] https://go.govbrief.today/schroyer-nomination [6] https://go.govbrief.today/arizona-overpass Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
